parsedJson.summary: The page shows the business name and navigation, but the above-fold area is mostly empty and gives local roofing customers very little reason to trust or contact the company.

issues.title: Blank hero area wastes first screen
issues.what_observed: The main area below the header is a large solid blue block with no headline, roofing photo, offer, suburb mention, review proof, or visible contact details.
issues.why_problem: A Google-searching Brisbane roofing customer lands here expecting to quickly confirm they found a real roofer who can help now. Seeing a mostly blank first screen makes the site feel unfinished and gives them no reason to keep reading or call.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Above the fold should show a real roof/worksite image or clean service background, a clear headline like 'Roof Repairs & Restorations in Brisbane', a short trust line, star rating or years-in-business proof, and a phone/book button visible immediately.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the solid blue hero block with a photo-led hero section containing a Brisbane roofing headline, 1-2 service benefits, Google review proof, and two CTAs: 'Call Now' and 'Request Free Quote'.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页第一屏几乎是一大片蓝色空白，客户一打开看不到你做什么、服务哪里、为什么可信。
issues.customer_impact: 客户通常会在几秒内决定要不要继续看；本地找屋顶维修的人很急，如果第一屏没有电话和信任信息，很多人会直接回到 Google 找下一家公司。

issues.title: Mobile has no visible call action
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the header only shows the logo on the left and a hamburger menu on the right; the 'Book a Free Consultation' button and phone action are not visible.
issues.why_problem: Someone searching for a roofer on their phone often wants to call quickly. If they must open a menu or scroll before finding contact options, many will abandon the site and tap another roofing result.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile header should keep a clear tap-to-call button visible, such as a phone icon plus 'Call', with a secondary menu icon. The phone action should be reachable without opening navigation.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a sticky mobile header or bottom bar with 'Call Now' and 'Get Quote' buttons, while keeping the hamburger menu as a secondary control.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机版最重要的“打电话”入口被藏起来了，只剩菜单按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务客户在手机上通常想马上联系；如果多点一步才能找到电话，会明显减少来电，尤其会浪费 Google 商家资料带来的手机流量。

issues.title: No trust proof visible
issues.what_observed: The visible desktop and mobile areas do not show Google rating, customer reviews, licence/insurance claims, completed work photos, years of experience, or Brisbane service proof.
issues.why_problem: Roofing is expensive and high-risk for homeowners. Without immediate proof, a visitor cannot tell whether the company is established, local, insured, or worth inviting to inspect their roof.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The first screen should include a compact trust row such as '4.9 Google rating', 'Licensed & insured', 'Brisbane-wide', and '10+ years roofing experience', supported by real project imagery.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a trust strip directly under the hero headline with review rating, service area, licence/insurance proof, and a small set of real roof project photos or badges.
issues.plain_explanation: 客户第一眼看不到评价、资质、保险、案例照片这些能让人放心的信息。
issues.customer_impact: 修屋顶金额高，客户怕被骗或施工不好；缺少信任证明会让询盘转去看起来更可靠的竞争对手。

issues.title: Desktop CTA is too vague
issues.what_observed: The desktop header has a dark blue rounded button saying 'Book a Free Consultation' with a small phone icon, but no phone number is visible.
issues.why_problem: A local roofing visitor may want to speak to someone immediately. 'Book a Free Consultation' feels slower and less direct than a visible Brisbane phone number or 'Call Now' action.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Desktop header should show the phone number plainly, paired with a strong button such as 'Call 07...' or 'Get Free Roof Quote', with enough contrast and spacing.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Change the header CTA to display the actual phone number and add a separate quote button; use one primary accent color and keep the action visible across the site.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑端虽然有预约按钮，但客户看不到电话号码，行动不够直接。
issues.customer_impact: 很多本地客户比较几家公司时会优先打给电话最明显的一家；隐藏号码会减少即时来电。

issues.title: Logo looks small and dated
issues.what_observed: The AUS Topline Roofing logo appears small in the top-left, with a dark roof graphic and compressed text that is hard to read, especially in the mobile screenshot.
issues.why_problem: A small, hard-to-read logo makes the business feel less polished and less established. On mobile, the name is difficult to confirm at a glance.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The header should use a cleaner, sharper logo treatment with readable business name text, consistent spacing, and enough size to identify the company without dominating the page.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rebuild the header brand lockup with a crisp logo file, larger readable wordmark, and optional short descriptor like 'Brisbane Roofing Specialists'.
issues.plain_explanation: Logo 太小，字也不清楚，手机版更难看清公司名字。
issues.customer_impact: 客户看不清品牌会降低安全感；对比其他屋顶公司时，形象不专业会让人更不愿意留下电话或预约。

issues.title: Navigation has distracting links
issues.what_observed: The desktop navigation includes 'Blogs' and 'Podcasts' alongside core links like Home, About Us, Services, and Contact Us.
issues.why_problem: A customer looking for roofing help wants services, proof, areas served, and contact options. Podcast and blog links can distract from the main action and make the business feel less focused on solving the immediate roofing problem.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Navigation should prioritize 'Roof Repairs', 'Roof Restoration', 'Gutter Services', 'Projects/Reviews', 'Service Areas', and 'Contact', with the primary quote/call action separate.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Simplify the main nav to service and trust pages; move blog or podcast content into the footer or resources section if still needed.
issues.plain_explanation: 菜单里有博客和播客，但客户最关心的是服务、案例、评价和联系方式。
issues.customer_impact: 选择太多会分散注意力；本来可能要咨询的客户点到无关内容后，可能就不再回到预约或电话按钮。

issues.title: Useful content starts too low
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the 'Where We Serve' heading is only barely visible at the very bottom after a large blue block and a large white gap.
issues.why_problem: Brisbane roofing customers need to know quickly whether their suburb is covered. Hiding service-area information below excessive empty space forces them to work harder before they can trust the business is relevant.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The first screen should hint at the next useful section, with service areas or core services visible just below the hero and no oversized blank vertical gaps.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the hero height, remove the blank white spacer, and bring a compact 'Brisbane suburbs we serve' or 'Roofing services' section into view immediately below the hero.
issues.plain_explanation: 真正有用的内容被推得太靠下，第一屏下面还留了很多空白。
issues.customer_impact: 客户找本地服务时会马上确认你是否服务他的区域；如果看不到，可能会认为不相关并离开。

positive_observations: The business name is present in the header, so the visitor can identify the company.
There is at least one consultation CTA on desktop that can be preserved and strengthened.
The simple blue-and-white color direction gives the redesign a clear starting point.
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace the blank blue first screen with a roofing-specific hero containing headline, trust proof, and call/quote CTAs.
2. Add always-visible mobile call and quote actions above the fold.
3. Rework header, navigation, and trust signals so Brisbane service relevance is obvious within seconds.
